compiled_state.title: Implement SC13 workflow-restart analysis script with methodology documentation
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## TDD Requirement
Depends on T12 (be62-4607). Implement plugins/dso/scripts/sc13-restart-analysis.sh to make test_sc13_analysis_computes_drop pass.

## Implementation Notes
Create plugins/dso/scripts/sc13-restart-analysis.sh:

CLI flags:
  --baseline-restart-rate=<float>     Story 1 baseline capture (e.g. 0.45 = 45%)
  --post-epic-restart-rate=<float>    Measured post-epic rate (e.g. 0.30)
  --sample-size=<N>                   (optional, default 100) for CI computation
  --output=<file>                     (optional) write JSON to file

Computes:
- drop_pct = (baseline - post_epic) / baseline * 100
- 95% confidence interval using normal approximation for proportions
- Contamination control note: baseline captured in Story 1 before any validator landed

Output format:
  RESTART_DROP_PCT: <value>%
  CI_95: [lower%, upper%]
  METHODOLOGY: {sample_size: N, baseline_capture: story_a96b-7ba8, contamination_controls: [pre-validator capture, single-epic scope], confidence_level: 0.95}
  SC13_VERDICT: PASS|FAIL (PASS if drop_pct >= 30)

When --output specified: write JSON summary

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Script is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/sc13-restart-analysis.sh
- [ ] Script computes correct drop percentage
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/sc13-restart-analysis.sh --baseline-restart-rate=0.45 --post-epic-restart-rate=0.30 | grep -q 'RESTART_DROP_PCT:'
- [ ] SC13 PASS when drop >= 30%
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/sc13-restart-analysis.sh --baseline-restart-rate=0.45 --post-epic-restart-rate=0.30 | grep -q 'SC13_VERDICT: PASS'
- [ ] SC13 FAIL when drop < 30%
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/sc13-restart-analysis.sh --baseline-restart-rate=0.45 --post-epic-restart-rate=0.40 | grep -q 'SC13_VERDICT: FAIL'
- [ ] METHODOLOGY block present
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/sc13-restart-analysis.sh --baseline-restart-rate=0.45 --post-epic-restart-rate=0.30 | grep -q 'METHODOLOGY:'
- [ ] test_sc13_analysis_computes_drop passes GREEN
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-sc13-restart-analysis.sh

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context (all 3 failure messages)
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user with full failure history
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet to opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
